browserFormat: Web Audio oscillator synthesis; no binary media codec required
license: Starville project-owned original; no third-party audio
volumeDefaults: bounded per-group values in Game Settings
muteBehavior: master and per-group mute with immediate application
unavailableFallback: fail silent with visible non-audio status; gameplay remains available
ownerGate: Listening, comfort, repetition, device, originality, and production-classification acceptance required
